title: angelonia angustifolia
intro: Angelonia angustifolia, also known as the Angel's Trumpet, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and the southwestern United States, characterized by its vibrant purple flowers and slender stems. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and saponins, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing stress, improving sleep, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Angelonia angustifolia is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
